global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with clear messaging and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity and inviting users to book a service.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a clean font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Your money, clearer' is displayed prominently in a bold font, conveying clarity and trust.

elements.label: Additional information
elements.description: A smaller text below the main message reads 'No hidden fees', emphasizing transparency.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Book now' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Circular graphic
elements.description: A simple circular graphic element that adds visual interest without distracting from the main message.

elements.label: Rectangular graphic
elements.description: A rectangular shape that complements the overall design, positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: Small circular graphic
elements.description: A smaller circular graphic that adds a playful touch to the design.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small, abstract shape that does not convey specific information but adds to the overall design.

elements.label: Another small graphic
elements.description: Another small abstract shape, similar to the previous one, enhancing the visual complexity.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Your money, clearer Book now' is displayed prominently, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a clean font, positioned at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
